def _receipt_verdict_for_term(
    term_id: str, receipts: Optional[list[Any]]
) -> tuple[Optional[str], str]:
    """Fold this term's per-source eligibility receipts into ONE audit verdict.

    Returns ``(status, detail)`` where ``status`` is:
      * ``SATISFIED`` — the stage RAN and EVERY citable source subject to the term
        passed (>=1 pass, 0 fail, 0 unknown);
      * ``FAILED`` — at least one source FAILED the hard predicate;
      * ``UNKNOWN`` — the stage ran but a source's verdict was unknown (fail-closed:
        never fabricated as satisfied);
      * ``None`` — NO receipt for this term (the caller keeps the prebuilt-corpus
        UNKNOWN so a caller-supplied status string can never promote it).
    """
    if not receipts:
        return None, ""
    mine = [r for r in receipts
            if str(_receipt_get(r, "term_id")).strip() == term_id]
    if not mine:
        return None, ""
    verdicts = [str(_receipt_get(r, "verdict")).strip().lower() for r in mine]
    n_pass = verdicts.count("pass")
    n_fail = verdicts.count("fail")
    n_unknown = verdicts.count("unknown")
    if n_fail:
        return FAILED, (f"{n_fail} source(s) FAILED the hard predicate "
                        f"(pass={n_pass}, unknown={n_unknown}) — receipt-backed")
    if n_unknown:
        return UNKNOWN, (f"{n_unknown} source(s) UNKNOWN under the hard predicate "
                         f"(pass={n_pass}) — fail-closed, not claimed satisfied")
    if n_pass:
        return SATISFIED, (f"all {n_pass} citable source(s) PASSED the hard "
                           "predicate — receipt-backed")
    return None, ""


def _receipt_get(r: Any, key: str) -> Any:
    if isinstance(r, dict):
        return r.get(key, "")
    return getattr(r, key, "")


def _audit_retrieval_scope(
    contract: Any,
    retrieval_scope_status: str,
    *,
    receipts: Optional[list[Any]] = None,
) -> list[ComplianceFinding]:
    """Hard SCOPE terms (source type / language / date / jurisdiction / quality /
    topicality). When per-source eligibility RECEIPTS are supplied, a term is
    SATISFIED only if its stage ran and every citable source passed; a fail is
    FAILED; an unknown stays UNKNOWN (fail-closed). Without receipts (prebuilt
    corpus) discovery never ran under the contract, so the term is disclosed
    UNKNOWN — never claimed satisfied. RETRIEVAL-owned."""
    findings: list[ComplianceFinding] = []
    scope = getattr(contract, "scope", None)
    if not isinstance(scope, (list, tuple)):
        return findings
    for t in scope:
        if not _is_hard(t):
            continue
        val = getattr(t, "value", None)
        if val in (None, "", [], {}):
            continue
        dim = _norm(getattr(t, "dimension", "")) or "scope"
        tid = _norm(getattr(t, "term_id", "")) or dim
        # Prefer a receipt-backed verdict (the executable stage RAN under this
        # contract); fall back to the disclosure-only UNKNOWN when no receipt
        # covers the term. A caller-supplied status string can NEVER promote UNKNOWN.
        r_status, r_detail = _receipt_verdict_for_term(tid, receipts)
        if r_status is None:
            # also try the bare dimension id (bridge stages key by dimension).
            r_status, r_detail = _receipt_verdict_for_term(dim, receipts)
        if r_status is not None:
            findings.append(ComplianceFinding(
                term_id=tid,
                dimension=dim,
                status=r_status,
                owning_stage=_STAGE_RETRIEVAL,
                method="receipt",
                detail=(f"hard scope {dim}={_term_value_text(t)!r}: {r_detail}"),
                force="hard",
            ))
            continue
        findings.append(ComplianceFinding(
            term_id=tid,
            dimension=dim,
            status=UNKNOWN,
            owning_stage=_STAGE_RETRIEVAL,
            method="not_evaluated",
            detail=(f"hard scope {dim}={_term_value_text(t)!r}; "
                    f"retrieval_scope_status={retrieval_scope_status} — "
                    "discovery not evaluated under this contract "
                    "(disclosed, not claimed satisfied)"),
            force="hard",
        ))
    return findings

"""Offline proof of Phase C ENFORCEMENT: bridge + quality + topicality + receipts."""
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, "/home/polaris/wt/outline_agent")

from src.polaris_graph.planning.retrieval_projection import RetrievalPolicy
from src.polaris_graph.retrieval import quality_eligibility as qe
from src.polaris_graph.planning import contract_compliance as cc
from src.polaris_graph.planning.planning_gate_schema import (
    contract_from_dict, ScopeTerm,
)

# ---- 1) BRIDGE: policy -> protocol shape build_scope_enforcement reads --------
pol = RetrievalPolicy(
    allowed_source_kinds=["journal article"],
    excluded_source_kinds=["blog post"],
    date_from="2024-01-01",
    quality_profile="high",
    predicate_force={"allowed_source_kinds": "hard", "excluded_source_kinds": "hard",
                     "date": "hard", "quality_profile": "hard"},
    contract_hash="deadbeef",
)
proto = pol.to_scope_protocol()
sc = proto["scope_constraints"]
facet_ids = {(f["facet_id"], f["op"], f["strictness"]) for f in sc["facets"]}
assert ("peer_reviewed_journal", "prefer", "hard") in facet_ids, facet_ids
assert proto["date_range"]["start"] == "2024-01-01"
assert proto["user_constraints"]["timeline_strictness"] == "hard"
print("BRIDGE OK:", sorted(facet_ids), "| timeline=", proto["user_constraints"]["timeline_strictness"])

# opaque fallback for an unknown kind
pol2 = RetrievalPolicy(allowed_source_kinds=["quantum ansible transcript"],
                       predicate_force={"allowed_source_kinds": "hard"})
p2 = pol2.to_scope_protocol()
assert any(f["facet_id"].startswith("opaque:") for f in p2["scope_constraints"]["facets"])
print("BRIDGE opaque-preserve OK:", [f['facet_id'] for f in p2['scope_constraints']['facets']])

# ---- 2) QUALITY scorer: domain-neutral verdicts ------------------------------
cases = [
    ({"source_url": "u1", "tier": "T1", "is_peer_reviewed": True}, qe.PASS),
    ({"source_url": "u2", "tier": "T1", "is_peer_reviewed": False}, qe.FAIL),   # journal-shaped != peer-reviewed
    ({"source_url": "u3", "is_retracted": True, "tier": "T1"}, qe.FAIL),        # retraction dominates
    ({"source_url": "https://www.scirp.org/journal/x", "tier": "T1"}, qe.FAIL), # OJS mill host
    ({"source_url": "u5", "tier": "T6"}, qe.FAIL),                              # news/blog band
    ({"source_url": "u6"}, qe.UNKNOWN),                                         # no metadata -> fail-closed under hard
]
for row, want in cases:
    v, w, basis = qe.score_source_quality(row)
    assert v == want, f"{row} -> {v} (want {want}) :: {basis}"
print("QUALITY scorer OK:", [(c[1]) for c in cases])

# HARD eligibility: FAIL + UNKNOWN removed; PASS kept.
rows = [c[0] for c in cases]
qplan = qe.build_quality_eligibility(pol, rows)
excluded = qplan.eligibility_excluded_ids
assert "u1" not in excluded          # PASS kept
assert {"u2", "u3", "u5", "u6"} <= excluded  # FAIL + UNKNOWN masked (u6 fail-closed)
assert any("scirp" in e for e in excluded)
print("QUALITY hard-mask OK: excluded", sorted(excluded))

# SOFT preference: nothing excluded, only demote weights.
soft_pol = RetrievalPolicy(quality_profile="high", predicate_force={"quality_profile": "soft"}, contract_hash="h")
splan = qe.build_quality_eligibility(soft_pol, rows)
assert not splan.eligibility_excluded_ids
assert splan.url_to_quality_weight  # demotes present
print("QUALITY soft-demote OK: weights", splan.url_to_quality_weight)

# empty policy -> no-op
assert qe.build_quality_eligibility(RetrievalPolicy(), rows).is_empty()
print("QUALITY no-op-when-empty OK")

# ---- 3) TOPICALITY: floor-based quarantine (deterministic stub scorer) -------
def _stub_scorer(obj, subqs, rowdicts):
    # score by whether row text contains "labor"
    return {i: (0.9 if "labor" in rd["statement"].lower() else 0.1) for i, rd in enumerate(rowdicts)}

trows = [
    {"source_url": "on", "statement": "AI and the labor market", "direct_quote": ""},
    {"source_url": "off", "statement": "recipes for sourdough bread", "direct_quote": ""},
]
tplan = qe.build_topicality_eligibility(
    trows, objective="AI impact on labor", thread_queries=[], floor=0.5,
    scorer=_stub_scorer, contract_hash="h", is_hard=True,
)
assert tplan.eligibility_excluded_ids == {"off"}, tplan.eligibility_excluded_ids
print("TOPICALITY hard-quarantine OK: excluded", tplan.eligibility_excluded_ids)

# scorer None -> UNKNOWN, fail-OPEN (nothing quarantined)
tplan2 = qe.build_topicality_eligibility(trows, objective="x", floor=0.5,
                                         scorer=lambda *a: None, is_hard=True)
assert not tplan2.eligibility_excluded_ids
assert all(r.verdict == qe.UNKNOWN for r in tplan2.receipts)
print("TOPICALITY fail-open-on-no-embedder OK")

# ---- 4) RECEIPTS -> audit_contract: SATISFIED only with pass-receipts --------
contract = contract_from_dict({
    "objective": [],
    "scope": [{"term_id": "scope.source_quality", "dimension": "scope.source_quality",
               "value": "high", "origin": "explicit", "force": "hard", "spans": []}],
})
# all-pass receipts -> SATISFIED
recs_pass = [{"term_id": "scope.source_quality", "verdict": "pass"},
             {"term_id": "scope.source_quality", "verdict": "pass"}]
a1 = cc.audit_contract(contract, "report", scope_receipts=recs_pass)
f1 = [f for f in a1.findings if f.dimension == "scope.source_quality"][0]
assert f1.status == cc.SATISFIED, f1.status
# one fail -> FAILED
a2 = cc.audit_contract(contract, "report",
                       scope_receipts=recs_pass + [{"term_id": "scope.source_quality", "verdict": "fail"}])
f2 = [f for f in a2.findings if f.dimension == "scope.source_quality"][0]
assert f2.status == cc.FAILED, f2.status
# an unknown -> UNKNOWN (fail-closed, never fabricated satisfied)
a3 = cc.audit_contract(contract, "report",
                       scope_receipts=recs_pass + [{"term_id": "scope.source_quality", "verdict": "unknown"}])
f3 = [f for f in a3.findings if f.dimension == "scope.source_quality"][0]
assert f3.status == cc.UNKNOWN, f3.status
# NO receipts -> stays UNKNOWN (prebuilt-corpus default; caller string can't promote)
a4 = cc.audit_contract(contract, "report", retrieval_scope_status="fresh_gate_scoped")
f4 = [f for f in a4.findings if f.dimension == "scope.source_quality"][0]
assert f4.status == cc.UNKNOWN, f4.status
print("RECEIPTS audit OK: pass->SATISFIED, fail->FAILED, unknown->UNKNOWN, none->UNKNOWN")

print("\nALL PHASE C ENFORCEMENT CHECKS PASSED")
